titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Elizabeth Lyman, collector, theater and concert programs, 1898-1954.
Lyman, Elizabeth, collector, theater and concert programs, 1898-1954.
titlestmt.author: Compiled by RMC Staff

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library

profiledesc.creation: Finding aid encoded by RMC Staff

titlepage.titleproper: Guide to the Elizabeth Lyman, Collector, Theater And Concert Programs,1898-1954
titlepage.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections Cornell University Library

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu
http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

titlepage.date: © 2002 Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library

did.head: DESCRIPTIVE SUMMARY
did.unittitle: Elizabeth Lyman, collector, theater and concert programs,
did.repository: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library
did.abstract: Programs mainly for productions presented on the Cornell University campus and Ithaca Conservatory, Ithaca College, churches, public schools, movie theaters, and elsewhere in the city of Ithaca, N.Y.; also scattered items from New York City, Salt Lake City, Watkins Glen [N.Y.] Summer Theatre, and Hollywood.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Programs mainly for productions presented on the Cornell University campus and Ithaca Conservatory, Ithaca College, churches, public schools, movie theaters, and elsewhere in the city of Ithaca, N.Y.; also scattered items from New York City, Salt Lake City, Watkins Glen [N.Y.] Summer Theatre, and Hollywood.

unittitle.extref: Link to a PDF finding aid.

scopecontent.p: All the material in the collection may not be covered by this guide.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Elizabeth Lyman, collector, theater and concert programs, #2239. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
